test_cases.description: Verifies the skill enforces Google Ads RSA character limits (30 chars headlines, 90 chars descriptions)
test_cases.input: Write 5 RSA headlines and 2 descriptions for a project management SaaS targeting developers

test_cases.description: Verifies the skill organizes creative by angles (pain point, outcome, social proof, etc.)
test_cases.input: Generate ad copy for a code review tool. Start from scratch.

test_cases.description: Verifies the skill applies Meta Ads character limits and front-loads the hook in primary text
test_cases.input: Write a Meta ad for a cybersecurity SaaS. Primary text, headline, and description.
